calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: FULL-STACK selection+valuation conversion falsifier: co-armed MECH-448 demotion + MECH-449 Go/No-Go + P3 OFC devaluation VALUATION (composed via viability injection), sweep use_candidate_rule_field, DV committed-class entropy (MECH-309/ARC-062; conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK)
items.note: The conversion-ceiling campaign's assembly-vs-closure 'REAL TEST' (conversion_ceiling_campaign:FULLSTACK). Composes the THREE own-face-validated conversion levers that each FAIL C2 in isolation into ONE matched stack: MECH-448 rank-preserving F->eligibility demotion (689d PASS) + MECH-449 active Go/No-Go (689g PASS) + the P3 OFC devaluation VALUATION face (use_ofc_analog + use_ofc_devaluation_head + ofc_train_devaluation_head + ofc_devaluation_bias_scale=2.0; 485m own-face C1 devaluation-shift PASS 3/3). Template = 654j selection-stack (demotion+adaptive-floor+Go/No-Go+dACC+CRF+SD-056+phased P0/P1/P2); the OFC devaluation head is TRAINED in P1 via a SECOND outcome-coupled REINFORCE (own optimizer) alongside the lateral_pfc bias-head REINFORCE (485m OFC training merged into 654j P1); in P2 the trained valuation is mapped to a per-candidate viability and INJECTED into the already-armed MECH-449 Go/No-Go gate (agent.set_injected_go_nogo_signals; the 485m withdrawal mechanism), MATCHED on BOTH arms, so the gate composes the dACC perseveration axis + the OFC viability axis -- the OFC valuation lever genuinely PARTICIPATES in committed selection (design confirmed with user, AskUserQuestion 2026-07-06: compose via viability No-Go). ONLY swept variable = use_candidate_rule_field. PRIMARY DV = committed_class_entropy_nats (C2), paired-by-seed ARM_ON>ARM_OFF lift >=0.05 nats on >=2/3 seeds. Per-prong baseline discipline: own dedicated all-stack-ON/swept-var-OFF ARM_OFF control (no shared frozen baseline). NEW C1g readiness gate: the OFC devaluation head is TRAINED (weight-delta > 1e-3) AND produces a supra-floor DIFFERENTIATED devalued bias RANGE (> 0.05, the SAME statistic the injection routes on -- a RANGE, not a magnitude/mean-abs per the V3-EXQ-643 readiness rule); an inert/untrained OFC head self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. Keeps 654j C1a-f. THREE-BRANCH NO-WEAKENS map: PASS (C1 all non-vacuous incl OFC-live + C2 lift) -> supports MECH-309/ARC-062, closes behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-I; FAIL C1-holds/C2-fails -> conversion_ceiling_persists_despite_full_selection_valuation_stack, non_contributory, route to LEAVE-ONE-OUT ablation across the faces (do NOT weaken); FAIL C1-fails -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. PROMOTES NOTHING. RE-DERIVE BRAKE RELEASED: MECH-309/ARC-062 carry many prior substrate_ceiling autopsies, but this is a genuinely DIFFERENT mechanism/design (the co-armed 3-face full-stack composite, a NEW EXQ NUMBER -- NOT a 654 letter / same-substrate single-lever re-letter) AND the required upstream substrate is now BUILT+VALIDATED (MECH-448 689d PASS provisional; MECH-449 689g PASS provisional; OFC valuation face use_ofc_devaluation_head 485m face-validated). The confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-713_2026-07-05 (arbitration-reweighting route EXHAUSTED, governance-applied REE_assembly master 65940b83b5) routes explicitly to this selection-face retest. NO formal supersedes (new composite question). MINT: in-run self-mint emits BOTH arms reuse-ELIGIBLE (mint-as-you-go; rng_fully_reset + include_driver_script_in_hash=False; deterministic per-cell training, no cross-cell shared state -> reusable on the cloud machine-class). SEPARATE dedicated baseline mint SKIPPED (eyes-open disqualifier): the OFF arm is the entangled full-stack ecological training (not cleanly factorable like the 610/643 trainables), and the pre-registered FAIL-branch successors are LEAVE-ONE-OUT face ablations whose OFF config differs (different fingerprint) so they cannot reuse an all-faces-ON baseline; the free in-run self-mint covers the only realistic reuser (a straight 714a re-run / identical-stack sibling). Smoke: --dry-run PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK; mechanism verified LIVE at toy scale (two heads train, OFC head delta 0.50, viability injects 191/191 P2 ticks, demotion+Go/No-Go live, committed-class DV stable 5 classes) and the C1g devalued RANGE scales with GAP-A divergence (probe: range 0.25-1.9 at realistic summary spread 0.1-1.0, comfortably > 0.05 floor; toy 0.022 was starved by collapsed P0=8 summaries, fixed at full P0=200). Concurrency: V3-EXQ-714 was free (SD-063 session collaboratively moved its conditional-uncertainty validation to V3-EXQ-716); working-tree-vs-HEAD audit clean.
items.machine_affinity_note: cloud preferred (yield logic routes cloud workers ahead of the Mac); mint requires the linux-x86_64-py3.10 cloud machine-class (arm_fingerprint machine-class-bound). Heavy 2-arm x 3-seed x 350-ep behavioural, two-head P1 training + P2 OFC viability injection. Avoid the Mac.
